about.title: About Me
about.bio_1: As a Software Development Specialist deeply rooted in the Angular ecosystem, I architect scalable component structures and sophisticated data entry systems (Dynamic Reactive Forms, FormArray) for enterprise-level DCIM (Data Center Infrastructure Management) projects comprising 10+ modules. I am driven by a rigorous engineering discipline, transforming complex business workflows into high-performance, testable, and sustainable codebases.
about.bio_2: My expertise lies in developing innovative hybrid interface solutions by integrating Unity UI Toolkit (UXML/USS) and WebGL for real-time visualization components like Single Line Diagrams and Super Sensors. I specialize in architecting backend-driven dynamic UI engines and ensuring seamless high-density data synchronization via RxJS, with a specific focus on optimizing high-fidelity interfaces for 4K industrial displays.

project_1.title: Disaster Project UI
project_1.description: A React-based frontend featuring Google Maps integration for real-time disaster coordination and resource tracking.

project_2.title: Billing Assistant UI
project_2.description: A modern web interface built with React and Redux, featuring multi-language support for streamlined invoice management.

project_3.title: Billing Assistant API
project_3.description: A secure RESTful API featuring JWT and Tesseract OCR for automated bill data extraction, built with .NET and PostgreSQL.

project_4.title: Football Quiz
project_4.description: A quiz game developed with Unity and UI Toolkit, focusing on performant UI patterns and interactive gameplay.

project_5.title: TCDD Bot
project_5.description: An automation tool built with Playwright and Telegram API for real-time monitoring and notification of train ticket availability.

project_6.title: TCDD Bot API
project_6.description: A Node.js and MongoDB based backend service providing data orchestration and API support for the TCDD monitoring system.

resume.title: Resume

company_1.name: Birtech Technology
company_1.description: Architected and developed sensor monitoring, asset management and single line diagram modules for a DCIM application. Focused on implementing complex dynamic form systems and high-performance dashboards within a scalable Angular enterprise architecture.

company_2.name: Bihl+Wiedemann
company_2.description: Developed an end-to-end CV management application built on .NET Web API and PostgreSQL architecture, utilizing React for the frontend. Managed database design and RESTful API integration processes, taking an active role in the entire full-stack development lifecycle.

resume.education_description: Gained proficiency in core principles such as Data Structures, OOP, and Design Patterns. Focused on relational data modeling and query optimization while developing a discipline for architecting algorithmic solutions and sustainable software.
